title: Illage Art
description: This mod adds some interesting illagers and their corresponding special items.
body:
**Illage Art** is a Minecraft mod that introduces a host of either intriguing or formidable Illagers, transforming them from ordinary raiders into a coordinated faction! This mod adds four new core boss entities: **The Fire King, Floating Elder, Spider Summoner, and Key Holder**.Of course there are some common illagers,too.

Your world will no longer face simple raids. Prepare for organized invasions by these evolved enemies, who now wield strange magic and possess enhanced power. However, you too can grow stronger by exploring the world and defeating them, uncovering the true purpose of the Illagers through your actions. The mod also includes a substantial array of new tools and weapons!

The core experience revolves around **raids, Illagers, and magical artifacts!** Through in-game discoveries, you might find yourself ensnared by your own equipment—or learn to wield theirs! Nothing is certain.

Crafted for **Minecraft 1.20.1**, Illage Art focuses on seamless integration, offering both a formidable endgame challenge (truly difficult!) and rich new content to explore. This isn’t just a few new bosses; it’s a reinvention of one of Minecraft’s iconic factions, inviting you to reconsider everything you thought you knew about these doom-bringers.

Will you uncover their secrets, or become just another "masterpiece" in their terrifying collection?
